scanner_typescript_nested_depthState.description: State model derived from scanner_typescript_nested_depth TLA+ spec

DepthConsistency.message:
DepthConsistency violation: \A s \in skeletons :
        \/ (s.class_name = "None" /\ s.inside_class = FALSE)
        \/ (s.class_name # "None" /...
DepthConsistency.description: Verifier for invariant DepthConsistency from scanner_typescript_nested_depth spec

conditions:
cursor > N =>
        \A k \in 1..N :
            Events[k].type \in {"Func", "Method"} =>
                \E s \in skeletons : s.func_name = Events[k].name
AllFuncsRecorded.message:
AllFuncsRecorded violation: cursor > N =>
        \A k \in 1..N :
            Events[k].type \in {"Func", "Method"} =>
                \E s \in s...
AllFuncsRecorded.description: Verifier for invariant AllFuncsRecorded from scanner_typescript_nested_depth spec

MethodsHaveClass.message:
MethodsHaveClass violation: \A s \in skeletons :
        s.inside_class = TRUE => s.class_name # "None"
MethodsHaveClass.description: Verifier for invariant MethodsHaveClass from scanner_typescript_nested_depth spec

FuncsOutsideHaveNone.message:
FuncsOutsideHaveNone violation: \A s \in skeletons :
        s.inside_class = FALSE => s.class_name = "None"
FuncsOutsideHaveNone.description: Verifier for invariant FuncsOutsideHaveNone from scanner_typescript_nested_depth spec

StackDepthNonNegative.description: Verifier for invariant StackDepthNonNegative from scanner_typescript_nested_depth spec

CursorBounded.description: Verifier for invariant CursorBounded from scanner_typescript_nested_depth spec

assert_DepthConsistency.condition:
\A s in skeletons :
        or (s.class_name = "None" and s.inside_class = FALSE)
        or (s.class_name # "None" and s.inside_class = TRUE)
assert_DepthConsistency.message:
Assertion failed: DepthConsistency — \A s \in skeletons :
        \/ (s.class_name = "None" /\ s.inside_class = FALSE)
        \/ (s.class_name # "None" /...
assert_DepthConsistency.description: Test assertion for DepthConsistency from scanner_typescript_nested_depth spec

assert_AllFuncsRecorded.condition:
cursor > N implies
        \A k in 1..N :
            Events[k].type in {"Func", "Method"} implies
                \E s in skeletons : s.func_name = Events[k].name
assert_AllFuncsRecorded.message:
Assertion failed: AllFuncsRecorded — cursor > N =>
        \A k \in 1..N :
            Events[k].type \in {"Func", "Method"} =>
                \E s \in s...
assert_AllFuncsRecorded.description: Test assertion for AllFuncsRecorded from scanner_typescript_nested_depth spec

assert_MethodsHaveClass.condition:
\A s in skeletons :
        s.inside_class = TRUE implies s.class_name # "None"
assert_MethodsHaveClass.message:
Assertion failed: MethodsHaveClass — \A s \in skeletons :
        s.inside_class = TRUE => s.class_name # "None"
assert_MethodsHaveClass.description: Test assertion for MethodsHaveClass from scanner_typescript_nested_depth spec

assert_FuncsOutsideHaveNone.condition:
\A s in skeletons :
        s.inside_class = FALSE implies s.class_name = "None"
assert_FuncsOutsideHaveNone.message:
Assertion failed: FuncsOutsideHaveNone — \A s \in skeletons :
        s.inside_class = FALSE => s.class_name = "None"
assert_FuncsOutsideHaveNone.description: Test assertion for FuncsOutsideHaveNone from scanner_typescript_nested_depth spec

assert_StackDepthNonNegative.description: Test assertion for StackDepthNonNegative from scanner_typescript_nested_depth spec

assert_CursorBounded.message: Assertion failed: CursorBounded — cursor >= 1 /\ cursor <= N + 1
assert_CursorBounded.description: Test assertion for CursorBounded from scanner_typescript_nested_depth spec
